name: Shadow Copies Creation Using Operating Systems Utilities
notes:
This rule detects possible scenarios of credential access where shadow copies are crated using operating systems utilities.

Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Shadow Copies Creation Using Operating Systems Utilities
SIGMA Description: Shadow Copies creation using operating systems utilities, possible credential access


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(powershell|pwsh|wmic|vssadmin)\.exe' OR Filename MATCHES '%PowerShell.EXE|pwsh.dll|wmic.exe|VSSADMIN.EXE%' AQL filter query
when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [shadow or create]
TD_list: APPLY Shadow Copies Creation Using Operating Systems Utilities on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(powershell|pwsh|wmic|vssadmin)\.exe' OR Filename MATCHES '%PowerShell.EXE|pwsh.dll|wmic.exe|VSSADMIN.EXE%' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [shadow or create]
RED_list: Event name: Shadow Copies Creation Using Operating Systems Utilities
Event description: Detects possible scenarios of credential access where shadow copies are crated using operating systems utilities.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
